evals.name: springboot-java-maven-happy-path
evals.prompt: Setup MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem for my Spring Boot Java app using Maven.
evals.expected_output: A complete Spring Boot @Bean configuration for MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem with Maven dependencies and canonical placeholders.

evals.name: springboot-kotlin-gradle-existing-template
evals.prompt: I need to configure Flamingock for a Spring Boot Kotlin project with Gradle. I already have a MongoTemplate bean.
evals.expected_output: A Kotlin snippet creating the MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem from the existing MongoTemplate, plus Gradle plugin configuration.
expectations: Configures the flamingock plugin with springboot() and mongodb() modules
Does not create raw sync-driver wiring

evals.name: springboot-java-autoconfig-template
evals.prompt: My Spring Boot app already uses spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb but I do not declare a MongoTemplate bean manually. Wire MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem.
evals.expected_output: A Spring Boot MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem bean that relies on the existing MongoTemplate/autoconfiguration instead of inventing low-level wiring.
expectations: Uses MongoTemplate in the target-system bean
Does not create a raw MongoClient
Keeps the answer inside the Spring Data targetsystem boundary

evals.name: springboot-java-multiple-template-ambiguity
evals.prompt: I have two MongoTemplate beans in my Spring Boot Java app. Help me wire MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem.
evals.expected_output: A response that flags the multiple-bean ambiguity, asks for the intended bean or shows how to qualify one explicitly, without inventing a selection.
expectations: Does not silently choose one bean
Keeps the answer focused on MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem wiring

evals.name: targetsystem-hand-off-to-change-skill
evals.prompt: My MongoDBSpringDataTargetSystem is already configured. Now create a migration to add an index to users.
evals.expected_output: Either a hand-off to the MongoDB Spring Data change skill or migration-oriented help that assumes the TargetSystem is already configured and does not pretend onboarding is needed.
expectations: Either redirects to flamingock-mongodb-springdata-change or gives migration-oriented help for the requested change
Does not pretend onboarding or targetsystem setup is still needed
Keeps the response focused on migration authoring rather than redoing targetsystem wiring
